title: Duplicate Board - New function to copy Board with Items
excerpt:
Description
When you duplicate a board, need to be able to duplicate the Board and Items but NOT entries in all other columns. 
What are you trying to achieve
To be able to Duplicate boards to reuse for another project.

posts.author: TracyRobinson (Tracy Robinson)
